name: ActionDescriptor
desc: Describes an action the LLM wants to execute on the UI.

name: ActionDescriptor.fromJson
desc: Parse from LLM JSON response.

name: ActionDescriptor.fromToolCall
desc: Parse from OpenAI tool_call format.

name: actionName
desc: Action name (must match a registered action, e.g. "tap", "enterText").

name: args
desc: Arguments for the action (e.g. {"id": "42", "text": "Hello"}).

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: ActionDispatcher
desc: Dispatches ActionDescriptors to their handlers after resolving target nodes.

name: dispatch
desc: Dispatch an action to its handler.

name: lastError
desc: Last error message from a failed dispatch, if any.

name: ActionFunction
desc: Callback signature for registered actions.

name: ActionRegistry
desc: Manages the set of actions available to the agent.

name: execute
desc: Execute a registered action. Throws UnregisteredActionException if not found.

name: has
desc: Check if an action is registered.

name: register
desc: Register an action with a name, function, and optional parameter schema.

name: registeredActions
desc: List all registered action names.

name: toToolSchemas
desc: Export action definitions as OpenAI-compatible tool schemas.

name: unregister
desc: Unregister an action by name.

name: AgentCallbacks
desc: Callback hooks for observing AgentCore execution.

name: onActionExecuted
desc: Called after each individual action is executed.

name: onComplete
desc: Called when the agent loop ends (complete, error, or paused).

name: onError
desc: Called when an error occurs during the loop.

name: onStepComplete
desc: Called after each step completes (after verification).

name: onStepStart
desc: Called at the beginning of each perceive→plan→execute→verify step.

name: AgentConfig
desc: Configuration for the AgentCore.

name: conversationMaxTurns
desc: Maximum conversation history turns to retain.

name: copyWith
desc: Create a copy with selected fields overridden.

name: debugMode
desc: Enable debug logging to console.

name: enableDataMasking
desc: Whether to mask sensitive data before sending to the LLM.

name: maxRetries
desc: Number of unchanged-state retries before giving up.

name: maxSteps
desc: Maximum number of perceive→plan→execute→verify steps.

name: stepDelay
desc: Delay between agent loop steps (to let UI settle).

name: timeout
desc: Timeout for individual LLM requests.

name: AgentCore
desc: Main orchestrator for the Flutter Agent framework.

name: run
desc: Run the agent loop for the given task.

name: state
desc: Read-only access to the agent's current state.

name: stop
desc: Stop the agent loop after the current step completes.

name: build
desc: Describes the part of the user interface represented by this widget.

name: didUpdateWidget
desc: Called whenever the widget configuration changes.

name: dispose
desc: Called when this object is removed from the tree permanently.

name: initState
desc: Called when this object is inserted into the tree.

name: isActive
desc: Whether the overlay (and semantics) are currently active.

name: AgentOverlayWidget
desc: Widget wrapper that ensures semantics are enabled for the agent.

name: child
desc: The child widget to wrap.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: enabled
desc: Whether the agent overlay is active.

name: of
desc: Find the nearest AgentOverlayWidget ancestor.

name: AgentState
desc: Mutable state of the running AgentCore.

name: lastError
desc: Last error message, if any.

name: status
desc: Current execution status.

name: stepCount
desc: Number of loop iterations completed.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: AgentStatus
desc: Represents the current status of the agent.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: AuditEntry
desc: Audit log entry recording a single agent action.

name: action
desc: Action name that was executed.

name: args
desc: Arguments passed to the action.

name: error
desc: Error message if execution failed.

name: success
desc: Whether execution succeeded.

name: timestamp
desc: When the action was executed.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: AuditLog
desc: Records all actions executed by the agent for auditing and debugging.

name: clear
desc: Clear all entries.

name: entries
desc: Read-only view of all log entries.

name: failures
desc: Get only failed entries.

name: length
desc: Number of recorded entries.

name: log
desc: Add a log entry.

name: AutoApproveConsentHandler
desc: Always-approve consent handler for testing or trusted environments.

name: requestConsent
desc: Request user consent for the given list of actions.

name: AutoDenyConsentHandler
desc: Always-deny consent handler for locked-down environments.

name: requestConsent
desc: Request user consent for the given list of actions.

name: BuiltInActions
desc: Registers standard built-in actions that map to Flutter SemanticsActions.

name: actionMap
desc: Map of action names to their SemanticsAction counterparts.

name: allActionNames
desc: List all built-in action names.

name: registerDefaults
desc: Register all default actions on the given registry.

name: ConsentHandler
desc: Strategy for requesting user consent before agent actions.

name: requestConsent
desc: Request user consent for the given list of actions.

name: ConversationHistory
desc: Manages multi-turn conversation history for LLM interactions.

name: addAssistantToolCalls
desc: Add assistant tool calls from parsed ActionDescriptors.

name: addToolResult
desc: Add a tool result message.

name: addUserMessage
desc: Add a user message.

name: clear
desc: Clear all history.

name: length
desc: Number of messages in history.

name: maxTurns
desc:
Maximum number of messages to keep. Oldest are evicted first.
If null, no eviction is performed.

name: toMessages
desc: Return all messages in order for passing to the LLM.

name: CustomPromptTemplate
desc: User-customizable prompt template with placeholder substitution.

name: format
desc: Format a prompt from UI state, task, and available action names.

name: DebugEvent
desc: A single debug event with metadata.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: DebugEventType
desc: Types of debug events.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: DebugLogStream
desc: Streams agent debug events for UI binding.

name: actionExecuted
desc: Emit an action executed event.

name: completed
desc: Emit a completion event.

name: dispose
desc: Close the stream.

name: error
desc: Emit an error event.

name: stepStarted
desc: Emit a step start event.

name: stream
desc: Stream of debug events.

name: DefaultPromptTemplate
desc: Default prompt template matching the original Planner.buildPrompt() format.

name: format
desc: Format a prompt from UI state, task, and available action names.

name: ExecutionResult
desc: Result of executing a single action.

name: action
desc: The action that was attempted.

name: error
desc: Error message if execution failed.

name: success
desc: Whether execution succeeded.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Executor
desc: Executes ActionDescriptors against the ActionRegistry.

name: actionConfirmation
desc:
Optional per-action confirmation callback.
Return true to proceed, false to skip the action.

name: actionDispatcher
desc: Optional dispatcher for node-resolved execution.

name: actionTimeout
desc: Optional timeout for individual action execution.

name: executeAll
desc: Execute a list of action descriptors sequentially.

name: executeSingle
desc: Execute a single action descriptor.

name: uiTree
desc: Current UI tree for dispatcher node resolution.

name: IsolateLLMClient
desc: Wraps any LLMClient to execute LLM requests in a Dart Isolate.

name: factory
desc: Factory function that creates the inner LLMClient inside the isolate.

name: requestActions
desc: Send a prompt with available tool schemas and receive action descriptors.

name: LLMClient
desc: Abstract interface for LLM communication.

name: requestActions
desc: Send a prompt with available tool schemas and receive action descriptors.

name: LLMException
desc: Exception thrown when LLM communication fails.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Macro
desc: A named, replayable sequence of actions.

name: Macro.fromJson
desc: Deserialize a macro from JSON.

name: length
desc: Number of actions in this macro.

name: toJson
desc: Serialize this macro to a JSON-encodable map.

name: MacroRecorder
desc: Records a sequence of ActionDescriptors as a replayable macro.

name: clear
desc: Clear all recorded actions.

name: length
desc: Number of recorded actions.

name: record
desc: Record an action.

name: toMacro
desc: Build a Macro from the recorded actions.

name: MacroStore
desc: Stores and retrieves macros as JSON strings.

name: deserialize
desc: Deserialize a macro from a JSON string.

name: serialize
desc: Serialize a macro to a JSON string.

name: NodeResolver
desc: Resolves WidgetDescriptor nodes from a tree using a Selector.

name: resolve
desc: Find the first node matching selector in the root tree.

name: resolveAll
desc: Find all nodes matching selector in the root tree.

name: OpenAILLMClient
desc: OpenAI API implementation of LLMClient.

name: apiKey
desc: OpenAI API key.

name: baseUrl
desc: Base URL for the API (allows custom endpoints / proxies).

name: dispose
desc: Clean up HTTP resources.

name: model
desc: Model to use (default: gpt-4o).

name: requestActions
desc: Send a prompt with available tool schemas and receive action descriptors.

name: systemPrompt
desc: System prompt instructing the model to act as a UI agent.

name: Planner
desc: Constructs LLM prompts from the current UI state and parses responses.

name: buildPrompt
desc: Build the text prompt from the UI state and task.

name: conversationHistory
desc: Optional conversation history for multi-turn LLM interactions.

name: plan
desc:
Build a prompt from the current UI state and task, send to LLM,
and return the parsed action descriptors.

name: promptTemplate
desc: Optional prompt template for customizing LLM prompts.

name: retryExecutor
desc: Optional retry executor for resilient LLM calls.

name: PromptTemplate
desc: Abstract interface for prompt formatting strategies.

name: format
desc: Format a prompt from UI state, task, and available action names.

name: RetryExecutor
desc: Executes an async function with automatic retry and exponential backoff.

name: backoffMultiplier
desc: Multiplier applied to delay after each retry.

name: execute
desc: Execute fn with retry logic.

name: initialDelay
desc: Delay before the first retry.

name: maxAttempts
desc: Maximum number of total attempts (including the first try).

name: onRetry
desc: Optional callback invoked before each retry.

name: Selector
desc: Defines how to locate a target node in the semantics tree.

name: Selector.byId
desc: Create a selector that finds by node ID.

name: Selector.byLabel
desc: Create a selector that finds by label text.

name: Selector.fromJson
desc: Parse from JSON: {"by": "label", "value": "Submit"}

name: by
desc: The selection strategy.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: value
desc: The value to match against.

name: SelectorType
desc: Strategy for locating a target SemanticsNode.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: SemanticTreeWalker
desc:
Traverses Flutter's live SemanticsNode tree and produces
a WidgetDescriptor tree for the agent.

name: capture
desc: Capture the current semantics tree as a WidgetDescriptor tree.

name: SemanticsActionExecutor
desc: Bridge between agent actions and Flutter's semantics performAction API.

name: isSupported
desc: Check if an action name is supported.

name: perform
desc: Perform a semantics action on the node with the given nodeId.

name: supportedActions
desc: List all supported action names.

name: SensitiveDataMasker
desc: Masks sensitive data in WidgetDescriptor trees before sending to LLM.

name: mask
desc: Mask sensitive data in the entire tree.

name: maskChar
desc: Character used to replace sensitive data.

name: StreamingLLMClient
desc: Extension of LLMClient that supports streaming responses.

name: requestActionsStream
desc: Stream action descriptors as they arrive from the LLM.

name: UnregisteredActionException
desc: Thrown when attempting to execute an action not in the registry (whitelist).

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: UnsupportedActionException
desc: Thrown when an unsupported action name is requested.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: VerificationDetail
desc: Structured diff result showing exactly what changed between two UI trees.

name: VerificationDetail.compare
desc: Compare two WidgetDescriptor trees and produce a detailed diff.

name: VerificationResult
desc: Result of a post-action verification check.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: Verifier
desc: Verifies that agent actions had the intended effect on the UI.

name: captureAndVerify
desc: Capture the current UI state and compare with a previous snapshot.

name: verify
desc: Compare two UI state snapshots.

name: WidgetDescriptor
desc: Represents a single node in the UI semantics tree.

name: actions
desc: List of available SemanticsAction names on this node.

name: children
desc: Child descriptors forming the subtree.

name: copyWith
desc: Create a copy with modified fields.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: hint
desc: Accessibility hint (e.g. "Double tap to activate").

name: id
desc: Unique node identifier (from SemanticsNode.id).

name: label
desc: Accessibility label describing this element.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: role
desc: Semantic role (e.g. "button", "textField", "slider", "generic").

name: toJson
desc: Serialize to JSON for prompt construction.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: value
desc: Current value (e.g. slider position, text field content).
